homepage.eyebrow: Study in China. Live the Story.
homepage.heroTitle: Come to China for an education and a bigger world.
homepage.heroSubtitle: Find a university, discover a city, and begin a study, travel, and life journey across China.
homepage.mapTitle: Explore China on an interactive destination map
homepage.mapDescription: Hover each China destination to preview its signature image, representative schools, city life, travel culture, and application pathway.
homepage.popularSchoolsDescription: Compare rankings, tuition, location, and scholarship options from the first MVP dataset.
homepage.ctaTitle: Ready to plan your China study path?
homepage.ctaDescription: Share your target degree, budget, and preferred city. Our consultants will help shortlist options.
